program_context.title: Responsible AI Capacity for Civil Service
program_context.problem_summary: Public institutions need practical responsible AI competencies and governance procedures to deploy AI-enabled services safely and accountably.
program_context.target_population: National and subnational civil servants in participating ministries/agencies
assumptions: Illustrative budget and participating agency counts; replace during inception.
Baseline competency and service performance values collected in months 1-2.

theory_of_change.if_then: If civil servants receive practical responsible AI training and agencies adopt minimum AI governance controls, then institutions can improve service quality with safer and more accountable AI-enabled workflows.
key_assumptions: Agency leadership allocates staff time for training and implementation.
Data and digital infrastructure remain available for pilot services.

inputs: Funding, technical team, curriculum, learning platform, ministry partnerships, M&E systems
outputs: Pilot services launched with monitoring dashboards
outcomes: Improved responsible AI competencies among civil servants by month 24
Institutionalized AI governance controls in participating agencies by month 24
Improved quality metrics for pilot services by month 24
logic_model.impact: More effective, transparent, and accountable digital public services over 3-5 years.

O1_skills.name: Share of participants reaching proficiency threshold
Average practical assessment improvement
O1_skills.definition_formula: average post-test score - average pre-test score (pp)

O1_skills.name: Share of trained staff applying responsible AI tools in workflows
O1_skills.definition_formula: (verified users in prior 90 days) / trained staff sampled * 100

O2_institutional_adoption.name: Share of agencies with approved AI governance package
O2_institutional_adoption.definition_formula: (agencies with approved SOP package) / participating agencies * 100

O2_institutional_adoption.name: Share of new AI initiatives passing governance review pre-launch
Median governance review turnaround
O2_institutional_adoption.definition_formula: median days from submission to decision

sdg_alignment.rationale: Improved quality and accountability of services
